A note before we begin
Valign Preview

Welcome, and thank you for being part of this journey. Valign is in its early testing phase, and your presence here is a gift to this work.

This is a shared space of trust. Everything generated inside, the guidance, the scripts, the analysis, is confidential and intended solely to support your feedback to Karabed Leadership Group as we shape this tool together.

We are so grateful for your partnership. What you share here helps us build something that truly serves leaders and the communities they support.

Admin

Valign

Leadership Response
Karabed Leadership Group

A trauma-informed leadership response tool. Enter your organization's values, describe a staff behavior, and receive structured guidance grounded in what your culture stands for.

Fast Mode — In the moment
What was the staff's behavior?
Write what you just observed. We'll respond with what to do, say, watch for, and save — in under a minute.
Your organization's values
One-time setup: enter your organization's values below. We'll remember them, so every future visit skips straight to the behavior.
Separate with commas. You'll only enter these once.
Protect privacy — do not include identifying information
Please do not enter names, dates of birth, addresses, phone numbers, client IDs, or any other identifying details about staff or clients. Describe the behavior and context only.
Pattern:
Practice Mode — Before you send
Check your words against your values
Paste a draft email, text, or what you plan to say. We will check whether it lives the values your organization stands for, and offer specific phrase-level feedback.
Your organization's values
No values found: please go to Fast Mode or Detailed Mode first to add your organization's values. We will use those values to check your words here.
This stays in your browser. We only send it to the analysis engine to check it against your values.
1
Your values
2
The situation
Step One
Begin with your values
The values you enter here become the lens through which the situation is read. Add the ones your organization actually names.
Type your own, edit existing values, or tap from the common values below.
✓
Your values
2
The situation
Step Two
Describe what you observed
Write the situation as you would describe it to a trusted colleague. The more specific your account, the more grounded the guidance will be.
Protect privacy — do not include identifying information
Please do not enter names, dates of birth, addresses, phone numbers, client IDs, or any other identifying details about staff or clients. Describe the behavior and context only.
Include what was said or done, and the context. Use roles (e.g., "case manager," "intake staff") rather than names.
Reading the situation through your values
This may take 30 to 60 seconds. Your guidance will appear here.

Role Play — Practice the conversation
How do you want to practice this?
